title: Mind Map
description: AI analyzes document structure and generates mind maps
emptyContent: ❌ Document content is empty, cannot generate mind map.
promptPlaceholder: Describe the mind map you need...
defaultPrompt: Generate a structured mind map from the document content
welcomeDesc: AI analyzes document structure and automatically generates Markdown-format mind maps.
systemPrompt: You are a professional document analysis assistant, skilled at converting document content into structured mind maps. Output in Markdown indented list format.
